main.name: Amrutha Adiyath
main.description: I'm a full-stack software developer with {{EXPERIENCE}} years of experience building modern, scalable web applications. I enjoy creating clean, maintainable solutions that deliver great user experiences across the frontend, backend, and database layers.
main.bio: Hi, I'm Amrutha Adiyath, a full-stack developer based in Moose Jaw, Saskatchewan. Over the past {{EXPERIENCE}} years, I've built web applications using React, TypeScript, Java, Python, PostgreSQL, and modern cloud technologies. I enjoy solving real-world problems, learning new technologies, and creating software that makes people's lives easier.
main.bio_p: Outside of software development, I spend most of my time with my husband and our five rescue cats. I enjoy creating JavaScript and CSS experiments, crafting polished user interfaces, and volunteering with animal rescue organizations by fostering cats until they find their forever homes.
main.contactmessage: Whether you have a project, a career opportunity, or simply want to connect, I'd love to hear from you.
funFacts: I write software professionally and rescue cats in my free time.
Originally from Thrissur, Kerala—now happily navigating Saskatchewan winters.
I enjoy building JavaScript and CSS experiments just for fun.
{{EXPERIENCE}} years of software development experience, five rescue cats, and one incredibly supportive husband.
I'm happiest when I'm building useful software or helping animals find loving homes.

resume.skillmessage: Technologies and tools I've used professionally throughout my software development career:

education.degree: Post Graduate Diploma in Technology Management
education.description: Strengthened my software development skills through hands-on projects using Java, Python, and SQL Server while gaining practical experience in networking, Power BI, Agile project management, ITIL practices, business strategy, and data privacy.

education.degree: Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science and Engineering
education.description: Built a strong foundation in computer science through algorithms, data structures, software engineering, and web technologies. During this time, I developed personal and freelance websites that helped launch my professional software development career.

work.title: Technical and Client Resource Coordinator
work.description: Lead the design, development, and maintenance of custom web and mobile applications that support client services, volunteer management, and appointment scheduling for a high-demand nonprofit. Automated manual processes, improved operational efficiency, and introduced reporting tools that enable better decision-making.
bullets: Architect, develop, deploy, and maintain full-stack web and mobile applications used daily by staff, volunteers, and clients.
Built an automated IVR appointment booking system, making services accessible for clients without smartphones.
Reduced administrative workload by automating scheduling workflows and repetitive business processes.
Provide ongoing technical training and support for staff and volunteers.
Improved reporting accuracy, database performance, and operational efficiency through process optimization.

work.title: Store Associate
work.description: Delivered exceptional customer service by helping pet owners find products tailored to their animals' needs while building lasting customer relationships through product knowledge and genuine care.
bullets: Provided personalized product recommendations based on pets' individual needs.
Built strong customer relationships through friendly communication and exceptional service.

work.title: Full-Stack Developer
work.description: Designed and delivered enterprise-scale web applications across the full technology stack using React, Java, Python, Node.js, and PostgreSQL. Collaborated with cross-functional teams to build reliable, high-performance software for global clients.
bullets: Built responsive, accessible web applications using React and modern JavaScript.
Developed scalable backend services using Java, Python, and Node.js.
Optimized large-scale databases through indexing, query tuning, partitioning, and caching strategies.
Worked closely with designers, QA engineers, and product teams to deliver reliable production software.

work.title: Developer Intern
work.description: Started my professional software development journey by transforming design wireframes into responsive, production-ready web pages while learning modern frontend development practices.
bullets: Converted UI wireframes into responsive, cross-browser web pages.
Learned modern frontend development practices while contributing to production projects.

volunteer.description: Provide foster care, medical support, and socialization for rescue cats while helping prepare them for successful adoption into permanent homes.
Rescued, rehabilitated, and fostered stray cats while supporting local animal welfare initiatives and adoption efforts.

certifications.name: IELTS
certifications.description: Achieved an overall IELTS Band Score of 8.0, including 8.5 in Speaking, demonstrating strong professional English communication skills.

projects.category: Mobile application for appointment booking and client services
